# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy
on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]
jobs:
  build-deploy:
    runs-on: [self-hosted, custom]
    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
    - name: Run Custom Build Script
      run: |
        chmod +x ./build.sh
        ./build.sh
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
    - name: Run Custom Deploy Script
      run: |
        chmod +x ./deploy.sh
        ./deploy.sh
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
    - name: Security Scan
      run: |
        echo "Running security scan..."
        # Add security scanning commands here
    - name: Validate Deployment
      run: |
        echo "Validating deployment..."
        # Add deployment validation commands here
